Anicet Charles Gabriel Lemonnier

Study for Penelope
by Anicet Charles Gabriel Lemonnier
France, 19th century · c. 1806 · black chalk heightened with white chalk, with stumping, squared in graphite
←Leger Jean Louis Lemoyne→
